# `collaboration` — collaboration templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating workplace collaboration platforms

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Slack Account Audit | [`slack_notification.html`](slack_notification.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Microsoft Teams Guest Access Request | [`teams_alert.html`](teams_alert.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 30-50% |
| Zoom Cloud Recording Ready | [`zoom_meeting.html`](zoom_meeting.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |

## Template details

### Slack Account Audit

- **File:** [`slack_notification.html`](slack_notification.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/collaboration_education.html`](education/collaboration_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Action Required: Slack Account Audit
  - Your Slack workspace access needs verification
  - [Slack] Admin message requires your response
- **Operator notes:** Effective against daily Slack users. Admin impersonation + deadline is a high-click combo.

### Microsoft Teams Guest Access Request

- **File:** [`teams_alert.html`](teams_alert.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/collaboration_education.html`](education/collaboration_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Microsoft Teams: Guest access request requires your approval
  - [Teams] Action required before 5:00 PM today
  - Pending approval: External user requesting channel access
- **Operator notes:** Auto-approve deadline is highly effective pressure tactic. Works well for mid-level managers.

### Zoom Cloud Recording Ready

- **File:** [`zoom_meeting.html`](zoom_meeting.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/collaboration_education.html`](education/collaboration_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your cloud recording is now available
  - [Zoom] Meeting recording ready - expires in 7 days
  - Recording: Q4 Planning — Leadership Sync
- **Operator notes:** Storage-full warning adds urgency. Meeting name personalization increases effectiveness.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
